title: Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in Optometry
content: A PhD in Optometry program is an advanced research degree focused on the scientific study of vision, eye health, and related disorders. The program typically involves extensive research, coursework, and the completion of a dissertation. Students engage in areas such as visual sciences, ocular diseases, contact lenses, and optical technology. The degree is designed for those aiming to pursue careers in academia, research, or advanced clinical practice. It equips graduates with the skills to contribute to the field through innovative research and improved eye care practices.
